summary: Complete testing of Department Settings tab redesign. All features working correctly: 1) Card-style tabs with icons, labels, and count badges implemented. 2) Department-specific color themes applied (Gates=emerald, Planning=violet, Plazas=blue). 3) الموظفين (Employees) moved into Settings tabs for all departments. 4) Sidebar no longer shows separate employee links - employees accessed via Settings tabs only.

gates_department_settings.tabs_count: PASS - 5 tabs: الأبواب(17), الموظفين(0), الخرائط(1), الورديات(0), المواقع(0)
gates_department_settings.emerald_theme: PASS - Background rgb(236, 253, 245), Border rgb(167, 243, 208), Active border rgb(4, 120, 87)
gates_department_settings.tab_click_shifts: PASS - Shifts table with add/edit buttons loads
gates_department_settings.tab_click_locations: PASS - Locations table with add/edit buttons loads

planning_department_settings.violet_theme: PASS - Background rgb(245, 243, 255), Border rgb(196, 181, 253), Active border rgb(109, 40, 217)

plazas_department_settings.tabs_count: PASS - 4 tabs: الموظفين(1), الخرائط(0), الورديات(1), المواقع(0)
plazas_department_settings.blue_theme: PASS - Background rgb(239, 246, 255), Border rgb(191, 219, 254), Active border rgb(29, 78, 216)
plazas_department_settings.maps_tab_loads: PASS - MapManagementPage with floor maps loads

sidebar_structure.planning_sidebar: PASS - Shows: متابعة إدارة التخطيط, المعاملات, إعدادات القسم - NO separate الموظفين link
sidebar_structure.employees_in_settings_only: PASS - Employees accessed via إعدادات القسم tabs only

tab_ui_elements.icon_display: PASS - Each tab shows lucide icon (DoorOpen, Users, Layers, Clock, MapPin)
tab_ui_elements.count_badge: PASS - Count badges show on top-left of tabs with appropriate styling
tab_ui_elements.active_state: PASS - Active tab has colored border, shadow, and scale effect

critical_code_review_comments: SettingsTabButton component well-implemented with proper styling and transitions
DEPT_THEMES correctly defines color schemes for all 5 departments
Dynamic tab building based on department type works correctly
Tab counts fetched from respective APIs and displayed accurately
EmployeeManagement properly integrated as tab content
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 34 tested Department Settings tab redesign. Key test IDs: data-testid='department-settings', data-testid='settings-tabs-bar', data-testid='settings-tab-{label}'. Gates has 5 tabs (gates_data, employees, maps, shifts, coverage_locations). Planning has 3 tabs (employees, shifts, coverage_locations). Plazas has 4 tabs (employees, maps, shifts, coverage_locations). Department themes: gates=emerald(#047857), planning=violet(#6d28d9), plazas=blue(#1d4ed8). Employees tab renders EmployeeManagement component. Sidebar no longer shows separate الموظفين links for departments.
